text.title: Feature Flag Cleanup Discipline Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) pinning the shape of a valid Feature Flag Cleanup Discipline artefact. The validator script enforces required keys, types, and the forbidden-pattern list before the orchestrator accepts the output.

section.title: Schema

example.note: Missing every required field; no owner, no template_version, no evidence — rejected by `validate-feature-flag-cleanup-discipline.py` with exit 1.

forbidden.pattern: Field declared as list/object in the schema is emitted as prose paragraph.
`template_version` empty or set to a string that does not match the methodology frontmatter.
Required array fields shipped empty when the schema declares minItems >= 1.
Agent self-approves the artefact (`status=approved`) without a reviewer field naming a human distinct from the producing agent.

text.reference: Validator script — exit 0 on pass, 1 on fail with violation list.
